claimText: IIT Bombay scientists developed Lotus leaf-like Solar Evaporators using a hydrophobic Graphene-based material for water desalination.
evidenceExcerpt: IIT Bombay Scientists develop Lotus leaf-like Solar Evaporators for Salt-water Treatment, through a new hydrophobic Graphene-based material
examUse: Statement-based question on recent indigenous technological developments in water treatment.

claimText: Low Temperature Thermal Desalination (LTTD) plants, which heat saline water and collect condensed vapor, are operational in Lakshadweep islands such as Kavaratti, Minicoy, and Agatti.
evidenceExcerpt: Thermal Technology Concept: Heating of saline water and collecting condensed vapor... Example: Low Temperature Thermal Desalination (LTTD) plants in Kavaratti, Minicoy and Agatti Islands in Lakshadweep.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching desalination technologies to their operational locations in India.
distractorHooks: Located in Andaman and Nicobar Islands

claimText: Membrane desalination technology utilizes semi-permeable membranes to filter dissolved solids but is susceptible to fouling and may not completely remove Total Dissolved Solids (TDS) or pathogens.
evidenceExcerpt: Membrane Technology Concept: Feedwater is pumped through semi-permeable membranes to filter out dissolved solids... Membrane technologies are susceptible to fouling and may not fully remove Total Dissolved Solids (TDS) or pathogens.
examUse: Statement-based question on the features and limitations of membrane-based water treatment technologies.
distractorHooks: Completely removes all TDS and pathogens
Involves heating and condensation of water
